creator: leon+freebsd@darkk.net.ru
text:
(In reply to Kristof Provost from comment #9)

Libxo? Yes, please! That's exactly how CLI glue should be done in the better world! I've completely forgotten about libxo. Thanks for reminder! *excited*

I'd be glad to make an attempt to contribute pfctl+libxo patch in a few months after solving some other problems in my backlog.

Meanwhile, I'll be waiting for verdict on `-T reset` patch.

My opinion is that it's "as good as -T expire is" and that it makes the feature somewhat more "complete", but I'm obviously biased here.
